title: Micro-Resource Types Sold
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SellMicroResources_MicroResources mr JOIN SellMicroResources s ON s.event_id = mr.SellMicroResources_event_id WHERE s.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND s.event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(mr.Name_Localised, mr.Name) AS label, CAST(SUM(mr.Count) AS INTEGER) AS value FROM SellMicroResources_MicroResources mr JOIN SellMicroResources s ON s.event_id = mr.SellMicroResources_event_id WHERE s.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND s.event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY mr.Name ORDER BY value DESC
